top_signals.title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
top_signals.summary: The SpaceX IPO euphoria is over, but the bullish trend in space economy jobs remains in place within a labor market where many other sectors have slowed hiring.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
